mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.login_name AS loginName, u.user_name AS userName, u.password_hash AS userPassword, u.default_board_id AS defaultBoardId, ur.role_id AS roleId FROM ib_user u LEFT JOIN ib_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT role_name FROM ib_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.login_name AS loginName, u.user_name AS userName, ur.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, u.status AS userStatus FROM ib_user u LEFT JOIN ib_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN ib_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE u.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY u.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ib_user (user_id, login_name, user_name, password_hash, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{loginName}, #{userName}, #{passwordHash}, 'ACTIVE')
mapper.update: UPDATE ib_user SET status = 'INACTIVE', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
